sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, event_date String, value Int32);
SELECT id, toModifiedJulianDayOrNull(event_date) * value AS julian_value FROM test_dates;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT toModifiedJulianDayOrNull(event_date) * value AS julian_value FROM test_dates WHERE value > 0) AS derived_table HAVING julian_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT SUM(NULLIF(toModifiedJulianDayOrNull(event_date), 0) * value) AS total_sum FROM test_dates WHERE value < 15;
CREATE TABLE test_numbers (num1 Int32, num2 Int32);
SELECT num1, num2, toModifiedJulianDayOrNull(CAST(CONCAT('2020-01-', toString(num1)) AS String)) * num2 AS computed_value FROM test_numbers;
SELECT AVG(toModifiedJulianDayOrNull(event_date) * value) FROM test_dates GROUP BY value HAVING AVG(value) > 5;
CREATE TABLE complex_join (id UInt32, reference_date String);

SELECT ct.id, ct.reference_date, td.value * toModifiedJulianDayOrNull(td.event_date) AS interaction_value FROM test_dates AS td JOIN complex_join AS ct ON toModifiedJulianDayOrNull(td.event_date) IS NOT NULL AND td.id = ct.id;
SELECT toModifiedJulianDayOrNull('2020-12-31') AS test_date, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM complex_join WHERE reference_date > '2020-01-01') * 2 AS count_result;
